scenarios.name: A_HOT_DRAFT
assertions: DraftedEmail produced: subject="Supporting FinTrust AI's evaluation — DataPilot"
send_email() NOT called automatically — email held for approval

scenarios.name: B_DISQUALIFY
assertions: send_email() NEVER called (verified via mock interception)

scenarios.name: C_APPROVAL_GATE
assertions: C2: Rep edited draft — subject changed to 'EDITED SUBJECT — rep override'
C2: send_email() received EDITED version, not original draft ✓

scenarios.name: D_FAIRNESS
assertions: Alice Morgan score=100.0, Carlos Mendes score=100.0 — identical ✓
Cross-check: original scores and tiers match between pair ✓
